home.eyebrow: HAR PARIVAAR KE LIYE · HAR PEEDHI KE LIYE
home.subtitle: Apne logon ki aawaazein, kahaniyaan aur chehre save karein — taaki sau saal baad bhi aapke par-pote jaanein ki aap kaun the.
home.ctaPrimary: Apne parivaar ki kahani shuru karein

auth.title: Apne parivaar ki legacy shuru karein
auth.subtitle: Apna private archive banayein — ya wapas sign in karein. Aapke parivaar ki kahaniyaan safe hain, sirf aapki.
auth.checkEmail: Shuru karne ke liye apna email check karein.
auth.guarantee: Aapka archive private hai. Sirf woh parivaar dekh sakta hai jise aap invite karte hain.

region.title: Aapka parivaar kahan se hai?
region.subtitle: Hum wahan boli jaane waali languages suggest karenge — par har language aapke liye open rahegi.
